case_title: ROY E HODGSON VS. JOSEPH ALVAREZ

docket_entries.description: REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JAN-29-2025.
